prospects.name: Cameron Boozer
prospects.scouting: Best statistical foundation in the class: elite efficiency, rebounding and connective playmaking. The cleanest fit with tleilaxu's scoring settings.

prospects.name: AJ Dybantsa
prospects.scouting: Highest-volume scorer and strongest NBA opportunity bet. Rebounding and assists help, but the college stocks and turnover profile trail Boozer/Wilson in this format.

prospects.name: Caleb Wilson
prospects.scouting: The format-specific swing: 2.9 college stocks per game plus offensive rebounding can create a fantasy ceiling beyond his NBA draft slot. Shooting volume is the key translation question.

prospects.name: Darryn Peterson
prospects.scouting: High-end scoring guard with real steal production, but only 24 college games and a low assist rate make the fantasy translation less certain than the NBA draft slot implies.
